name: Sleep Token
description:
'''Sleep Token''' are an anonymous English [[Rock music|rock]] band formed in [[London]] in 2016. They have released four studio albums, two EPs, two standalone songs, and multiple covers.

The band consists of two main members, only known as Vessel and II, and two touring members, known as III and IV. The members have never revealed their real names or identities. On stage, they conceal themselves with masks, long robes, and black body paint.
